---
title: "Tag Returns Markdown"
output: html_document
date: "2026-07-15"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
rm(list=ls()) # Clear environment

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(scales)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

##Import needed files
setwd(paste0("C:/Users/", Sys.info()[7],"/Documents/GitHub/HerringScience.github.io/Box Coordinates/"))
  boxes = read.csv("surveyBoxes.csv")


TagReturns <- read_csv(
  "C:/Users/herri/Documents/GitHub/HerringScience.github.io/Source Data/Tagging/Tag Returns/Full Returns.csv")



#Grounds to use
timGrounds <- read.csv("C:/Users/herri/Documents/GitHub/HerringScience.github.io/Main Data/timGrounds.csv")

# Build polygons from timGrounds
ground_list <- split(timGrounds, timGrounds$Box)

polys <- lapply(ground_list, function(x){
  
  coords <- as.matrix(x[, c("X", "Y")])
  
  if(!all(coords[1, ] == coords[nrow(coords), ])){
    coords <- rbind(coords, coords[1, ])
  }
  
  st_polygon(list(coords))
})

grounds_sf <- st_sf(
  Box = names(ground_list),
  geometry = st_sfc(polys, crs = 4326)
)

TagReturns <- TagReturns %>%
  mutate(
    Date = as.Date(Date),
    returnedDate = as.Date(returnedDate),

    category = cut(
      daysAtLarge,
      breaks = c(-Inf, 3, 11, 31, 184, 366, 731, 1095, Inf),
      labels = 1:8,
      right = FALSE
    ),

    category = as.numeric(as.character(category)),
    Count = 1
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(Tag_Num),
    daysAtLarge > 0
  )

location_lookup <- c(
  "German Bank" = "GB",
  "Scots Bay" = "SB",
  "NB Coastal" = "NBC",
  "Grand Manan" = "GM",
  "Grand Manan Banks" = "GMB",
  "Long Island" = "LI",
  "Seal Island" = "SI",
  "Yankee Bank" = "YB",
  "Trinity" = "T",
  "Browns Bank" = "BB",
  "SW Grounds" = "SWG",
  "Gannet Dry Ledge" = "GDL",
  "Lurcher" = "L"
)

#### Functions
create_tag_returns <- function(data, tagging_ground) {

  origin_code <- location_lookup[[tagging_ground]]

  data %>%
    filter(Ground == tagging_ground) %>%
    mutate(
      DestinationCode = location_lookup[returnedArea],
      TagLocation = paste(origin_code, "to", DestinationCode)
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(DestinationCode))
}

create_summary_table <- function(data) {

  data %>%
    count(
      TagLocation,
      category,
      name = "Abundance"
    ) %>%
    arrange(TagLocation, category)
}

plot_tag_returns <- function(data, title) {

  ggplot(
    data,
    aes(
      x = TagLocation,
      fill = factor(category)
    )
  ) +
    geom_bar(colour = "white") +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(
      x = "Tag to Catch Location",
      y = "Number of Events",
      fill = "Category"
    ) +
    ggtitle(title) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      breaks = pretty_breaks()
    )
}

ground_report <- function(
    data,
    tagging_ground,
    remove_cat1 = TRUE
){

  tag_data <- create_tag_returns(
    data,
    tagging_ground
  )

  if(remove_cat1){

    tag_data <- tag_data %>%
      filter(category != 1)

  }

  list(
    data = tag_data,
    summary = create_summary_table(tag_data),
    plot = plot_tag_returns(
      tag_data,
      paste(tagging_ground, "Tag Returns")
    )
  )

}

```



```{r Summary Table, echo=FALSE}

SummaryTable <- TagReturns %>%
  group_by(category) %>%
  summarise(
    AverageDaysAtLarge = round(mean(daysAtLarge, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    MinimumDaysAtLarge = min(daysAtLarge, na.rm = TRUE),
    MaximumDaysAtLarge = max(daysAtLarge, na.rm = TRUE),
    Abundance = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(category)

kbl(
  SummaryTable,
  col.names = c(
    "Category",
    "Average Days at Large",
    "Minimum Days",
    "Maximum Days",
    "Number of Returns"
  ),
  align = "c"
) %>%
  kable_paper("striped", full_width = FALSE)

```

```{r Returns by Year, echo = FALSE}

returns_by_year <- TagReturns %>%
  mutate(return_year = year(as.Date(returnedDate))) %>%
  group_by(return_year) %>%
  count(category)

table(
  Year = year(TagReturns$returnedDate),
  Category = TagReturns$category
)

category_labels <- c(
  "0-2",
  "3-10",
  "11-30",
  "31-183",
  "184-365",
  "366-730",
  "731-1094",
  "1095+"
)

ggplot(
  returns_by_year,
  aes(
    x = factor(category, labels = category_labels),
    y = n,
    fill = factor(return_year)
  )
) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    title = "Tag Returns by Category and Return Year",
    x = "Days at Large Category",
    y = "Number of Returns",
    fill = "Return Year"
  )

```

```{r, echo = FALSE}

TagReturns <- TagReturns %>%
  mutate(category = factor(category))

grounds <- sort(unique(TagReturns$Ground))

for(g in grounds){

  p <- TagReturns %>%
    filter(Ground == g) %>%
    ggplot(
      aes(
        x = returnedArea,
        fill = category
      )
    ) +
    geom_bar() +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(
      title = paste("Returns from", g),
      x = "Return Area",
      y = "Number of Returns",
      fill = "Days at Large"
    ) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(
        angle = 45,
        hjust = 1
      )
    )

  print(p)

}

SummaryTable <- TagReturns %>%
  group_by(
    Ground,
    returnedArea,
    category
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    TotalReturns = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

kbl(SummaryTable)

```
